summary: First test run for GhostBoard AI - All core features tested. Backend: 12/12 tests pass. Frontend: all pages load correctly, auth flow works, document CRUD works, navigation works.

issues: Page title shows 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of 'GhostBoard AI' - minor branding issue

action_items: Optional: Update HTML <title> in public/index.html from 'Emergent | Fullstack App' to 'GhostBoard AI'
critical_code_review_comments: CORS configured with allow_origins=['*'] and allow_credentials=False - acceptable for JWT-based auth but note credentials=False means cookies won't work cross-origin (not used here so OK)
Admin password stored in .env as plaintext - expected for seed admin, bcrypt hash created correctly at startup
No brute force protection on /api/auth/login - could be added in production
server.py is 476 lines - acceptable but approaching complexity limit
seed_data_creation: Test document 'Test Document Title' created in memory for admin user during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features verified working: auth (login/register/logout/protected routes), dashboard stats, AI Architect page UI, CTO Console page UI, RAG Memory (add/list/delete documents). AI streaming endpoints not tested for actual AI response content (OpenRouter API calls) - only API structure verified. Next agent could test AI streaming response quality.
rca_of_issues: No critical issues found. Minor: page <title> tag shows generic 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of app-specific title.
